description_long: This is an ornate Victorian-style chaise with a dark, richly textured upholstery and a wooden frame featuring intricate carved details. The backrest is high and elegantly curved, with deep button tufting and decorative woodwork along the top edge. The seat is wide and plush, designed for lounging, and the armrests are asymmetrical, with one side higher and more pronounced than the other. The legs are cabriole-shaped, adding to the antique aesthetic, and the wood has a dark, polished finish. The upholstery appears to have a subtle damask pattern, enhancing the luxurious appearance. This piece would be a striking addition to a park, urban plaza, or upscale public space.
description: A luxurious Victorian-style chaise with dark, patterned upholstery, ornate woodwork, and cabriole legs. Features a high, tufted backrest and asymmetrical armrests.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chaise's high, curved backrest and one prominent armrest, highlighting the depth of the seat.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the full seat area, tufted backrest, and the ornate woodwork along the upper edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the lower armrest and the chaise's overall profile, emphasizing the seat's length.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, curved wooden back with decorative carving and the cabriole legs.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high, elegantly curved, and features deep button tufting with ornate woodwork along the top edge. It has a segmented, asymmetrical design with decorative flourishes.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, with the left armrest being higher and more pronounced, and the right armrest lower and more subtle.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are cabriole-shaped, made of dark polished wood, and feature subtle carved details that enhance the antique look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is dark and features a subtle damask pattern with deep button tufting on the backrest, giving it a luxurious, textured appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, wide seat cushion integrated into the frame, with the backrest and armrests padded and upholstered as part of the main structure. No loose cushions are visible.
